scripts.build:all: npm run tokens && npm run build -w photography-to-ui && npm run build -w @cucusa/docs && npm run build -w @cucusa/switching-brain
scripts.check:staleness: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const changed=execSync('git diff --name-only HEAD -- tokens/').toString().trim();if(!changed){console.log('No token files changed — skipping staleness check');process.exit(0)}console.log('Token files changed — checking staleness...');execSync('npm run tokens',{stdio:'inherit'});try{execSync('git diff --exit-code tokens/dist/tokens.css',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch{console.error('tokens/dist/tokens.css is stale — run: npm run tokens');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm run check:staleness && npm run check:coverage -- --full && npm run check -w photography-to-ui && npm run check -w @cucusa/docs && npm run check -w @cucusa/switching-brain && eslint . && prettier --check "photography-to-ui/src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}" "docs/src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}" "switching-brain/src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}"
